Typedefs | Functions
streams.h File Reference

Typed list of stream descriptors. More...

#include "list.h"
#include "stream.h"

Go to the source code of this file.

Typedefs

typedef list_t streams_t
 List of stream_t descriptors.
 

Functions

static streams_t * streams_new (size_t initial_capacity)
 Allocate a new streams list.
 
static void streams_free (streams_t *streams, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Free a streams list and optionally each stream.
 
static bool streams_add (streams_t *streams, stream_t *stream)
 Append a stream to the list.
 
static stream_t * streams_get (const streams_t *streams, size_t index)
 Retrieve a stream by index.
 
static size_t streams_size (const streams_t *streams)
 Return the current number of streams.
 
static size_t streams_capacity (const streams_t *streams)
 Return the allocated capacity.
 
static bool streams_empty (const streams_t *streams)
 Check whether the list is empty.
 
static stream_t * streams_find (const streams_t *streams, const char *name)
 Find a stream by name.
 
static void streams_clear (streams_t *streams, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Remove all streams from the list, optionally freeing each one.
 
static void streams_inspect (const streams_t *streams, int(*print_func)(const char *,...))
 Print a human-readable dump of the streams list.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Provides streams_t (a list_t specialization) together with creation, access, lookup and inspection helpers.

[in]streamPointer to the stream to copy in.
Returns
true on success.

inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]streamsPointer to the list.
Returns
true if the list contains no items.

static stream_t * streams_find ( const streams_t * streams,
const char * name )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]streamsPointer to the list.
[in]nameNull-terminated name to search for.
Returns
Pointer to the matching stream, or NULL if not found.

size_t index )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]streamsPointer to the list.
[in]indexZero-based index.
Returns
Pointer to the stream, or NULL if out of range.
